clawmemBin.label: ClawMem Binary Path
clawmemBin.help: Path to clawmem binary. Auto-detected from PATH if not set.

tokenBudget.label: Context Token Budget
tokenBudget.help: Max tokens for context surfacing injection (default: 800)

enableTools.label: Register Agent Tools
enableTools.help: Register ClawMem retrieval tools for agent-initiated queries

servePort.label: REST API Port
servePort.help: Port for ClawMem HTTP REST API (used by tools)

gpuLlm.label: LLM Endpoint
gpuLlm.help: URL for ClawMem LLM (query expansion, extraction)

gpuLlmModel.label: LLM Model
gpuLlmModel.help: Model name sent to the configured LLM endpoint

gpuLlmReasoningEffort.label: Reasoning Effort
gpuLlmReasoningEffort.help: Optional top-level reasoning_effort for Chat Completions endpoints that support it. Unset omits the field.

gpuLlmNoThink.label: Append /no_think
gpuLlmNoThink.help: Append /no_think to remote LLM prompts (default: true). Disable for standard OpenAI models.

charsPerToken.label: Chars Per Token
charsPerToken.help: Heuristic for token estimation: ~4.0 OpenAI, ~3.4 Claude, ~2.5 Qwen, ~3.2 Llama. Default 3.5.

compactionContextWindow.description: Override the conservative 200K default context window tokens

precompactProximityRatio.description: Override the proximity ratio for precompact gate (clamped to [0.5, 0.95])

charsPerToken.description: Chars-per-token heuristic for token estimation (default: 3.5). Use ~4.0 for OpenAI, ~3.4 for Claude, ~2.5 for Qwen.
